backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TrackFlow backend, defining types and state for users, habits, activities, payment requests, and coupons, with access control, storage mixins, and authorization helpers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that admin privilege/role-based access checks blocking the Users section in the admin panel were removed, with references to the affected file and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON mapping of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each component or hook's purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the TrackFlow React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with hash history, React Query, and route layouts (public, protected with/without sidebar) for all app pages including admin.
frontend/src/components/activities/EditA: Modal dialog component for editing an existing activity's habit, name, times, earnings, productive flag, and notes, using the updateActivity mutation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponMana: Admin UI component for creating and deleting discount coupons, with a form for code, discount percent, usage limit, and expiry date, plus a table listing existing coupons.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsQu: Admin UI component that displays pending payment requests in a table and allows admins to approve or reject each request.
frontend/src/components/admin/PlatformSt: Admin dashboard component that fetches and displays platform-wide statistics (total users, activities, habits, payment requests) as a grid of stat cards.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersTable: Admin UI component that lists all users in a searchable table and allows admins to view and update each user's subscription plan.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Activi: Dashboard component that renders a vertical timeline of logged activities for the day, with edit and delete actions for each entry.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AddAct: Form component for logging a new activity against a selected habit, capturing name, time range, productivity flag, earnings, and notes.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/HabitP: Renders a labeled progress bar for a single habit showing current vs. goal minutes, with a completion checkmark and color-coded fill.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StatsC: Displays a single statistic in a colored card with a label, value, icon, and optional subtitle, supporting six color themes.
frontend/src/components/habits/HabitForm: Modal dialog for creating or editing a habit with fields for name, goal type, goal hours, and color, using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/habits/UpgradePl: Modal that informs users they've hit their plan's habit limit and presents upgrade options (Starter/Premium) with a link to the pricing page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Simple footer component displaying copyright and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper that composes a collapsible Sidebar, a scrollable main content area, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: Collapsible sidebar with navigation links, active-path highlighting, tooltips in collapsed mode, and a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, clear, status) via a React context and AuthClient, with helpers to persist identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, habits, activities, streaks, plans, and coupons using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the TrackFlow indigo design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ActivitiesPage.tsx: Full-featured activities log page with filtering by habit/productivity/date, paginated table with bulk and single delete, CSV export, and an edit modal.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page that displays platform stats and tabbed sections for managing users, a payments queue, and coupon management.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Analytics page showing time distribution, daily earnings, and productivity charts via Recharts, with date range filtering and a paywall for paid-plan features.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying today's stats (hours, earnings, productivity), habit progress bars, activity timeline, and an add-activity form toggle.
frontend/src/pages/HabitsPage.tsx: Displays the user's habits list with add/edit/delete functionality, enforces plan-based habit limits, and shows an upgrade prompt when the limit is reached.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the TrackFlow login page with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Handles UPI payment submission for plan upgrades, including coupon validation, price calculation, and transaction ID entry.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Shows the three-tier pricing plans (Free, Starter, Premium) and handles plan selection, profile setup for new users, and navigation to the payment flow.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays and allows editing of the user's profile (phone number), shows activity/earnings stats, and provides data export and account deletion options.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors, border radius, shadows, animations) using OKLCH variables, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a fix request to remove admin privilege/role-based access checks that block the Users section in the admin panel, tracking one known issue and one existing feature.
